form.formComment: Placed last time (23.04) at this track in a Other, finishing third and beaten one length. Has three successes and four minors from nine starts from box 1. Looks suited and should go close.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (17.27) when second at Murray Bridge Straight in a Grade 6. Goes very well from the draw boasting 13 places from 18 starts. Suited here and expected to run well.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by 0.8 lengths at this track over 400m (22.97) beating National Grid in Other on April 12. Looks the one to beat again.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at her last three starts, most recently over 350m at Murray Bridge Straight. Prefer in something easier.

form.formComment: Good starter. Last start finished fifth over 342m at Angle Park, beaten 11 lengths (20.15) behind Trivia in a Grade 4/5 on April 13. Will find this a little easier. Is a danger.
